meta.purpose: Maschinenlesbares Register fuer verbindliche WellFit-Agenten-Workflows und Stufe-4-Autonomiegrenzen.

workflows.name: WellFit Stufe 4 Autonomous Development Workflow
workflows.summary: Ziel verstehen -> Konzept pruefen -> Struktur ableiten -> Seiten erfassen -> Aufgaben erstellen -> Code bauen -> automatisch testen -> Fehler beheben -> Dokumentation aktualisieren -> Preview liefern -> Nutzerfeedback auswerten -> weiter optimieren.

controlRegisters.purpose: Task selection, risk classification, stop rules, and definition-of-done controls for future autonomous agents.
controlRegisters.usage: Before choosing or implementing a task, classify risk, select a task candidate, select a definitionOfDoneKey, and honor stop conditions.

controlRegisters.purpose: Module readiness, risk, blockers, safe next task, duplicate-warning, advancement checks, and human-approval guidance for future agents.
controlRegisters.usage: Before selecting module work, verify readiness status and required checks; stop or request human review for blocked, review-required, critical, or protected modules.

controlRegisters.purpose: Repeatable loop for safe task selection, work recording, TODO status validation, and follow-up handoff for future agents.
controlRegisters.usage: Start by running the next-task picker, record completed PR outcomes with the recorder, run the follow-up detector in report-only mode, validate TODO status markers, and create follow-ups only in existing leading files.

controlRegisters.purpose: Detect route/API/register drift and concept-to-code mapping gaps before agents create duplicate routes, APIs, architecture, or product systems.
controlRegisters.usage: Run both scripts before adding routes, APIs, feature mappings, readiness changes, or concept-driven implementation work; resolve only safe registry gaps and leave high/critical areas for human review.

controlRegisters.purpose: Optional route-register-backed visual screenshot smoke validation for public, mobile beta-preview, and protected app routes without changing product logic or making browser checks mandatory.
controlRegisters.usage: Run after perceptible UI changes and through quality gate report-only mode; if browser support or preview URL is unavailable, record the safe skip instead of failing the main build.

controlRegisters.purpose: Internal-first, optional-external-research governance for unclear WellFit product or technical questions; requires three options, one recommendation, risk classification, and human review before implementation.
controlRegisters.usage: Read internal sources first, report when external research is unavailable, present at least three options, select exactly one recommendation, classify risk, and never implement high/critical or protected-topic decisions without explicit human approval.

workflows.antiDuplicationRule: If a feature, topic, API, route, or architecture area already exists in todolist/WORK_MAP.md or project-register files, continue there instead of creating a parallel implementation or duplicate architecture.

phases.purpose: Understand goal, scope, non-goals, safety boundaries, and expected result.
phases.requiredOutput: Goal and scope note with allowed and excluded work.
riskGates: Stop or document blocker if scope touches compliance, reward, payment, token, health, child, location, or privacy logic.

phases.purpose: Check existing concepts, Work Map, TODOs, and registers to avoid duplicate work.
forbiddenActions: create concepts beside existing leading files
phases.requiredOutput: Reference to leading file or documented reason for a new entry.
riskGates: Do not continue if an existing concept conflicts or a human decision is missing.

phases.purpose: Derive existing WellFit structure, module boundaries, and affected registers from the goal.
phases.requiredOutput: Structure decision with affected files/registers and excluded areas.
riskGates: Stop if work would touch Unity, PR #13, compliance-critical logic, or unapproved product areas.

phases.purpose: Capture affected pages, secondary pages, routes, APIs, and features before implementation.
allowedActions: plan crawl or audit for UI work
forbiddenActions: create routes or APIs without register entry
skip security review for API changes
phases.requiredOutput: Affected routes, APIs, and features in task plan and PR report.
riskGates: Economy/reward APIs must not activate final authority.

phases.purpose: Create small, reviewable tasks from structure and risks.
allowedActions: create new tasks only if no existing entry fits
phases.requiredOutput: Task plan with status, test plan, and documentation duties.
riskGates: No implementation without defined checks and explicit forbidden-area boundaries.

phases.purpose: If code work is in scope, implement the smallest suitable change inside existing architecture.
requiredInputFiles: relevant Next.js docs for Next.js API/routing/rendering/build changes
phases.requiredOutput: Minimal diff mapped to existing feature, route, or API.
riskGates: Stop if work would activate final reward/ledger authority, real purchases, secrets, or live integrations.

phases.purpose: Run lint, type, build, functions, and quality-gate checks.
phases.requiredOutput: Result list for npm run lint, npx tsc --noEmit, npm run build, npm --prefix functions run check, npm run agent:quality-gate, visual-route-smoke-check when visual/screenshot validation is relevant, and product-readiness-check where relevant.
riskGates: PR may include failures only with transparent cause, risk, and next fix step.
Visual screenshot checks remain optional/report-only unless browser support and a safe preview URL are explicitly available.

phases.purpose: Analyze found errors, fix them minimally, and repeat checks.
forbiddenActions: hide errors by removing important tests/rules
phases.requiredOutput: Fixed errors or documented blocker with cause, files, and next step.
riskGates: Document blocker instead of speculative fix when requirements conflict or decision is missing.

phases.purpose: Keep documentation and machine-readable registers aligned with the work.
phases.requiredOutput: Updated docs/registers or explicit note that no update is needed.
riskGates: Governance changes require human-readable and machine-readable sources to match.

phases.purpose: Deliver review-ready PR with preview/test notes.
phases.requiredOutput: Pull request with goal, changed files, checks, risks, preview notes, and next recommended task.
riskGates: Do not finish with commit but no PR, or PR but no commit.
No live release without human approval.

phases.purpose: Evaluate available user feedback after PR/preview and map it to existing tasks.
allowedActions: create new task only if no existing entry fits
forbiddenActions: treat feedback as automatic product approval
phases.requiredOutput: Feedback evaluation linked to existing tasks or justified new register entry.
riskGates: Compliance- or safety-relevant feedback requires human decision before implementation.

phases.purpose: Prepare the next small iteration without overloading the current PR.
allowedActions: sort follow-up work into existing registers
append agent work-log entries that record checks, follow-ups, and the next recommended task
forbiddenActions: continue feature work after closure without new assignment
phases.requiredOutput: Concrete next recommendation and clean handoff.
riskGates: Do not start another iteration when tests/build are red without documented blocker/plan.
